title: Bus management CRUD
description: Admin-only endpoints and UI to manage buses.

subtasks.title: API: create/list/update/delete bus
subtasks.description: POST, GET, PATCH, DELETE /api/admin/buses — all guarded by admin role check.

subtasks.title: Disable/enable bus toggle
subtasks.description: PATCH endpoint to flip status between active/disabled without deleting the record.

subtasks.title: Assign driver to bus
subtasks.description: PATCH endpoint + UI dropdown to set/change driverId on a bus (only approved drivers selectable).

subtasks.title: Admin UI: bus table + form
subtasks.description: Table listing all buses with status badges, edit modal/form for create/update.
